changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'Bioanalytical'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Create Bioanalytical lab unit entry in lab_unit_role_map

changeSet.author: openelis-bioanalytical

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'Bioanalytical'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_roles lr JOIN clinlims.system_role sr ON lr.role::int = sr.id WHERE lr.lab_unit_role_map_id = (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'Bioanalytical') AND sr.name IN ('Bioanalytical Sample Receiver', 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst', 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist', 'Bioanalytical Researcher', 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor', 'Bioanalytical Study Director', 'Bioanalytical QA Officer', 'Bioanalytical Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Assign all bioanalytical roles to Bioanalytical lab unit

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Sample Receiver')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Chemical Analyst')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Pharmacist')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Researcher')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Lab Supervisor')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Study Director')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical QA Officer')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'Bioanalytical Data Manager')
